title: AN ACT DECLARING CERTAIN PLACES IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LA PAZ, PROVINCE OF TARLAC, AS DULY CONSTITUTED BARRIOS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3661 / 57 OG No. 9, 1561 (February 27, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2843, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT DECLARING CERTAIN PLACES IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LA PAZ, PROVINCE OF TARLAC, AS DULY CONSTITUTED BARRIOS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:
